display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman and the team are under pressure to solve the murder of a volleyball player.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Fitz and Arch work with a Newfoundland Officer from Fitz's past to apprehend an infamous bank robber who's escaped to Saint-Pierre.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Sullivan's dream of leaving Kembleford is scuppered when he is arrested for receiving stolen goods.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth uncovers a dark secret when a contestant is murdered at a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman and the team are under pressure to solve the murder of a volleyball player.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Deep under the Atlantic Ocean, a scuba diver's oxygen supply is severed. After his body washes ashore, Charlie and Rex wade into a mystery deeper than the sea itself.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The world's largest ruby due is to be displayed at a museum fundraiser, but when an attempt is made to steal the gem, Murdoch must assemble a team to protect it.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a waitress is found strangled, Murdoch learns that Brackenreid met her at a mayoral rally. Meanwhile, a reluctant Higgins and keen Roberts conduct a door-to-door census.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Higgins and Roberts are convinced to invest in a new automat diner, Murdoch finds an unfortunate link between their undertaking and the death of a young man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After he witnesses the murder of a man on the street, Murdoch finds himself caught up in the beef between the Irish Catholics and Protestants.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is forced to help his estranged brother-in-law, who is embroiled in a murder investigation after one of his marks in an investment scam turns up dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a socialite narrowly escapes being poisoned, Charlie and Rex uncover a string of suspects - including an old flame of Jesse's.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Poppy Montgomery stars in the crime drama series. The murder of a lawyer leads Carrie and Al into a deadly revenge plot playing out in a federal courthouse.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. DI Goodman is embroiled in the cut-throat world of corporate team building.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Higgins and Roberts are convinced to invest in a new automat diner, Murdoch finds an unfortunate link between their undertaking and the death of a young man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After he witnesses the murder of a man on the street, Murdoch finds himself caught up in the beef between the Irish Catholics and Protestants.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is forced to help his estranged brother-in-law, who is embroiled in a murder investigation after one of his marks in an investment scam turns up dead.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a socialite narrowly escapes being poisoned, Charlie and Rex uncover a string of suspects - including an old flame of Jesse's.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Poppy Montgomery stars in the crime drama series. The murder of a lawyer leads Carrie and Al into a deadly revenge plot playing out in a federal courthouse.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Fitz and Arch work with a Newfoundland Officer from Fitz's past to apprehend an infamous bank robber who's escaped to Saint-Pierre.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. DI Goodman is embroiled in the cut-throat world of corporate team building.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: New arrival DI Neville Parker gets more than he bargained for when investigating the mysterious death of a young woman at the unveiling of a luxury timeshare resort.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome. Two Ford Escorts get Dave's pulse racing.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A widow reluctantly parts with her husband's treasured collection of Rolls Royces and Bentleys, and an impulse buyer finds one of the cars a new home.

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Age of Steam
programme.desc: Fred Dibnah looks at how steam revolutionised shipping, from the earliest paddle steamers to more modern vessels like the Britannia.

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Age of Steam
programme.desc: Fred Dibnah looks at the advances made with the invention of the steam turbine.

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: Fred Dibnah examines the development of castles, from early Iron Age forts to secret tunnels used during World War II, visiting Warwick and Hadrian's Wall.

programme.title: Fred Dibnah's Magnificent Monuments
programme.desc: Fred Dibnah celebrates the variety of Britain's houses and palaces, travelling from the grandeur of Hampton Court to a homely terrace in Beamish.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskvitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Mark 2 Jag and explains why they made such poor getaway cars for bank robbers. A customer considers a Morris Marina as a present for his wife.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The team have a record number of cars to auction, but Derek finds room for one more - a replica AC Cobra. A couple are reunited with their Volvo breakdown truck.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A classic car fan with a love of the Jaguar E-Type reluctantly sends his dream car to auction, hoping to buy a motorhome. Two Ford Escorts get Dave's pulse racing.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A widow reluctantly parts with her husband's treasured collection of Rolls Royces and Bentleys, and an impulse buyer finds one of the cars a new home.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskvitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics.

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Sean Fletcher puts on his hiking boots to walk the eight-mile route along the River Lea, take in the landmarks of an industrial past, and discover what its future holds.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this exhaustive account of World War II. In the deserts of North Africa, the 8th Army battles against Rommel's Afrika Korps.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this exhaustive account of World War II. In the deserts of North Africa, the 8th Army battles against Rommel's Afrika Korps.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Recalling America's entry into World War II after the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor, the great Laurence Olivier sheds more light on the deadliest conflict in history.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates this exhaustive account of World War II. In the deserts of North Africa, the 8th Army battles against Rommel's Afrika Korps.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: A milestone in TV history: Laurence Olivier tells the story of WWII. Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of victories, the Germans delay fatally.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: December 7, 1941 saw the infamous Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor. Laurence Olivier revisits this pivotal moment of World War II in the much-praised documentary series.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody hides a secret.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Harper has a bone to pick. An idea sparks for Mali. Will Jo fight for Tane?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: An individual face off ignites a battle of the sexes. And when elimination beckons, could another giant be about to fall?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Santa's Little Helper gets a job on the police force, Bart buys a python to replace him. S18 E20

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining room table for the apartment nearly causes Sheldon to break up with Amy, while Howard is offered a chance to return to space again. S7 E16

programme.title: St. Denis Medical
programme.desc: Season Finale: A storm causes chaos in the Emergency Department; Alex is torn between an obligation to her husband and her co-workers' needs; Joyce goes on a spending spree with found money. S1 E18

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mali and John hatch a plan. Roo’s concern for Alf grows. Sonny makes a triumphant return.

programme.title: Ready Gamer Mum
programme.desc: Series Premiere: It’s game on as ten teams of gamers and their Mums compete for gaming glory, the Ready Gamer Mum title, and a $50,000 prize.

programme.title: Meet The Parents
programme.desc: Male nurse Greg Focker meets his girlfriend's parents before proposing, but her suspicious father is every date's worst nightmare. Starring Ben Stiller and Robert De Niro. (2000)

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shark attack at a Las Vegas casino's pool leads the CSI team on an underwater adventure to catch a killer. S11 E2

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max tests a bold new cost-saving program that could help both New Amsterdam and its neediest patients. S5 E2

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Women On The Verge
programme.desc: It’s the annual press awards, the Oscars of the newspaper industry, and both Laura and Katie are nominated. S1 E3

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: The tables are turned and it’s up to our Ladies to plan dates for their Farmers..but the Farmers don’t know which Lady has proposed which date. When the dates return home - 2 Ladies leave the farm

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mali and John hatch a plan. Roo’s concern for Alf grows. Sonny makes a triumphant return.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Amy battles with a nemesis from her past, while Cody and Olivia find love and war closer to home. S4 E2

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The bakers aim for no soggy bottoms as they take on savoury pastry plaits, but who will have the judges tongue-tied? And whose showstopping tart and gala pie will be their final goodbye?

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: The sewers create adaptive dungarees, repurpose maternity wear into toddler outfits and design outfits inspired by their childhood dream jobs.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series‎
programme.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programme.title: The Hotel Inspector
programme.desc: Alex Polizzi revisits a 55-room Hollywood-themed hotel, Hotel Celebrity. Owner Ken has done more work to the hotel, and he has taken on another.

programme.title: Rich Holiday Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Glamourous entrepreneurs Jodie and Annie frequently spend thousands on luxury holidays abroad. So how will they cope when they swap with three friends on a budget UK camping trip?

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: The crew of Karen of Ladram hunts hake off of Cornwall, a rookie crew works in the Irish Sea, and trainee skipper Michael steps up in a storm.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough views the wildlife of Europe, with Italian mountain villages that are the hunting grounds for rarely seen wolves and lynx in the forests of Spain.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough views life in North America, with footage of roadrunners cruising the deserts of Arizona, and polar bears hunting beluga whales.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want to buy a VW Beetle. They locate a guy selling a project car, but fear it's almost too good to be true at less than 1,000 pounds.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien turn an old, unloved filing cabinet into a valuable and desirable storage unit and convert a Bakelite voltmeter into a retro Bluetooth speaker.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: The crew of Golden Promise face Force 6 winds in search of scallops off Wales.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: The historic Royal Albert Hall is in need of urgent repairs. A specialist team is required to restore the building to the highest order before its grand reopening.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: Salt water and iron don't mix and Southend Pier, built back in 1888, has seen better days. Now a team of specialists are working hard to prevent it falling into the sea.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1980s Sierra Cosworth draws in a crowd of Ford fans, while a restorer delights buyers with his 1966 Sunbeam Rapier and Sarah takes a shine to a caravan.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek dives into the lost Jowett marque, as a 1952 Javelin finds an unexpected home. Paul and Dave find a Ford Escort that's been untouched for 30 years.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: Hear how the arrival of American forces and an Allied counter-offensive in 1918 helped defeat Germany. Tragically, 11,000 men were killed or injured on Armistice Day.

programme.title: Hitler's Supercars
programme.desc: Documentary charting the rise of Nazi Germany's Silver Arrow Grand Prix and speed record cars of the 1930s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a second programme from the Bishop's Palace in Wells, Somerset, where items valued include a bracelet once gifted by Queen Victoria.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce takes the team to Dundee, where items include a miniature clock smuggled out of Germany during the Second World War and a copying machine from the 1780s.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: An impressive collection of five iconic cars arrives at Thornton le Dale, including a 1967 Crayford Corsair and a 1966 Ford Zodiac which emerge from a garage in Selby.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a Pinto engine.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: Hear how the arrival of American forces and an Allied counter-offensive in 1918 helped defeat Germany. Tragically, 11,000 men were killed or injured on Armistice Day.

programme.title: Hitler's Supercars
programme.desc: Documentary charting the rise of Nazi Germany's Silver Arrow Grand Prix and speed record cars of the 1930s.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look into the lives of mammals and how they have adapted to their surroundings. The first episode features animals that thrive in the dark.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: A look at how mammals adapt to the changes humans have made to their environment.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team seek out a sturdy, reliable 4x4 to tackle the rugged Yorkshire landscape in, but get side-tracked into a slightly rusty Subaru Impreza Turbo 2000. S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his spanking new Scania T Cab.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.desc: A 1939 Chrysler Royal arrives out of storage to the garage. It undergoes a surprise transformation for the client and is literally given the 'royal treatment'.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at the fauna of Africa, home to the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth. But even in this land of plenty, animals face big challenges.
